\section{Methods}
\label{sec:methods}

\subsection{Experimental Setup}
\label{subsec:setup}

The experimental setup is described here. We use the alignment environment:

\begin{align}
  f(x) &= x^2 + 2x + 1 \label{eq:quadratic} \\
  g(x) &= \sin(x) + \cos(x) \label{eq:trig}
\end{align}

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Results of the experiment.}
  \label{tab:results}
  \begin{tabular}{lcc}
    \toprule
    Method & Accuracy & Time \\
    \midrule
    Method A & 95.2\% & 1.3s \\
    Method B & 97.8\% & 2.1s \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

As shown in Table~\ref{tab:results}, Method B achieves higher accuracy
but at a cost of increased computation time~\cite{Smith2020,Jones2021}.

\subsection{Analysis}

The results from Section~\ref{subsec:setup} confirm our hypothesis.
